datamodel:
model ScrapeJob {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId String   @map("workspace_id")
  name        String
  targetUrl   String   @map("target_url")
  mode        String   @default("single")
  maxPages    Int      @default(10) @map("max_pages")
  status      String   @default("pending")
  leadsFound  Int      @default(0) @map("leads_found")
  pagesScraped Int      @default(0) @map("pages_scraped")
  completedAt DateTime? @map("completed_at")
  error       String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
  
  workspace Workspace @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  leads    Lead[]

  @@index([workspaceId])
  @@index([workspaceId, status])
  @@map("scrape_jobs")
}

model Lead {
  id           String    @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId   String    @map("workspace_id")
  companyId     String?   @map("company_id")
  scrapeJobId   String?   @map("scrape_job_id")
  // ... other fields
  scrapeJob ScrapeJob? @relation(fields: [scrapeJobId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
}
